assets.alt: Flat head-on liquid-glass framework panel on a turquoise and mint mesh background
assets.caption: Employee-generated content works best when real expertise, examples, and audience questions are organized into a repeatable publishing habit.
assets.generation_method: built-in image_gen, saved post-local as PNG
assets.notes: Regenerated with the flat head-on two-color Sell In Public liquid-glass hero process. Background uses one main color plus one close complementary color; graphic is front-facing with no isometric or angled perspective.
assets.final_prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: wide blog hero for Sell In Public blog, final should work as a 1600x700 landscape crop
Source context from article: Employee-generated content is original public content based on what employees know, see, build, test, sell, support, or learn. It differs from employee advocacy because employee-generated content starts with employee expertise, while advocacy starts with a company-approved message. The useful version teaches something specific from the employee's vantage point, so a reader leaves with a clearer idea, sharper question, usable example, or next step.
Primary request: Create one simple visual metaphor inferred from that article context: employee expertise organized into a durable public content foundation. Use one or two relevant visual elements only: a front-facing flat liquid-glass foundation panel with a few simple white content lanes or stacked expertise blocks inside it.
Style reference: Sell In Public Flat Liquid Mesh Hero style. Generated raster PNG. Background uses one main color plus at most one close complementary color. Matte translucent liquid-glass shapes. Simple head-on flat UI. Consistent white outline weight. Clean negative space. Subtle grain.
Composition: Wide landscape hero near 1600x700. One central or slightly off-center subject with quiet space around it. The glass/white graphic must be completely flat and viewed straight-on, like a 2D interface parallel to the image plane.
Scene/backdrop: Soft mesh gradient using only turquoise and mint. No third color family. Blend smoothly without hard edges.
Subject: One front-facing flat liquid-glass framework panel with sparse abstract white line marks and simple stacked expertise blocks. No readable words.
Detail density: Low. Simple, spacious, specific, editorial B2B.
Constraints: Generated raster PNG style only. No readable text, logos, watermarks, exact LinkedIn UI, fake metrics, scattered nodes, random lines, icon clouds, fake dashboards, overcomplicated UIs, generic LinkedIn-post-card default, glossy 3D objects, glow, bloom, flares, light trails, shiny/specular/reflection cues, bokeh/orbs, hard gradient edges, SVG/vector look, photoreal stock-photo look, more than two background colors, angled perspective, isometric view, tilted panels, 3D depth, shadows, or three-quarter UI view.

assets.alt: Abstract operating loop diagram showing employee expertise flowing into reusable public content
assets.notes: Article media under the examples section. Must keep natural aspect ratio.
